reasoning_content: Let me check which test cases have less than 100% score.

action.command: cd /workspace/YatCC && cat /workspace/YatCC/build/test/task1/score.txt | grep -v "100.00" | grep -v "^task1" | grep -v "^$" | grep -v "总分"

summary: Check which test cases don't have full score
